title: Tax Compliance Specialist
responsibilities: prepare tax calculations and compliance documents; analyze legislation changes and client impact; advise stakeholders on tax risks and optimization opportunities
requirements_text: We are looking for a middle specialist with hands-on experience in tax compliance, tax planning, excel, accounting, tax legislation. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: NovaSoft is hiring a middle tax compliance specialist to support supporting businesses with tax compliance, planning, and advisory work.
raw_text: Vacancy V097: Tax Compliance Specialist at NovaSoft. Location: Kyiv. Employment: full-time. Required experience: 2.0 years. Required skills: tax compliance, tax planning, excel, accounting, tax legislation, corporate tax, transfer pricing, reporting, risk analysis. Optional skills: client communication, financial modeling. Responsibilities: prepare tax calculations and compliance documents; analyze legislation changes and client impact; advise stakeholders on tax risks and optimization opportunities.
